message:
fix(tui,webhook): toast reduced-motion dismiss, conflict agent extraction, webhook error handling

Four targeted fixes across TUI and webhook subsystems:

1. Toast reduced-motion fix (components/toast.go, toast_test.go):
   - Dismissed toasts now disappear immediately when reduced motion is
     enabled instead of waiting for spring animation offset to advance
     (which never happens in reduced-motion mode, causing ghost toasts)
   - New toast_test.go with tests for spring animation init,
     IsAnimating(), and reduced motion dismiss behavior

2. Dashboard conflict agent extraction (dashboard/commands_test.go):
   - Extract ensureDashboardConflictAgent() from duplicated inline code
     in handleConflictAction() (used by both handoff-request and
     force-release paths)
   - Add TestHandleConflictAction_ForceRegistersDashboardAgent with
     httptest mock server verifying the register-then-force-release
     tool call sequence

3. Progress bar style tests (styles/styles_test.go):
   - Add ProgressBar tests for default characters and single custom color

4. Webhook manager hardening (webhook/manager.go):
   - Fix redundant redaction mode check
   - Add error handling for response body read

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+func TestHandleConflictAction_ForceRegistersDashboardAgent(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		mu    sync.Mutex
+		calls []string
+	)
+
+	server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		var req map[string]any
+		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
+			t.Fatalf("decode request: %v", err)
+		}
+
+		params, _ := req["params"].(map[string]any)
+		toolName, _ := params["name"].(string)
+		args, _ := params["arguments"].(map[string]any)
+
+		mu.Lock()
+		calls = append(calls, toolName)
+		mu.Unlock()
+
+		var result any
+		switch toolName {
+		case "register_agent":
+			result = agentmail.Agent{
+				ID:      1,
+				Name:    "sess_dashboard",
+				Program: "ntm-dashboard",
+				Model:   "local",
+			}
+		case "force_release_file_reservation":
+			if args["agent_name"] != "sess_dashboard" {
+				t.Fatalf("force_release agent_name = %#v, want sess_dashboard", args["agent_name"])
+			}
+			result = agentmail.ForceReleaseResult{
+				Success:        true,
+				PreviousHolder: "holder-a",
+				PathPattern:    "internal/robot/attention_feed.go",
+				Notified:       true,
+			}
+		default:
+			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
+			return
+		}
+
+		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{
+			"jsonrpc": "2.0",
+			"id":      req["id"],
+			"result":  result,
+		})
+	}))
+	defer server.Close()
+
+	t.Setenv("AGENT_MAIL_URL", server.URL+"/")
+
+	model := &Model{
+		session:    "sess",
+		projectDir: "/tmp/ntm",
+	}
+
+	err := model.handleConflictAction(watcher.FileConflict{
+		Path:                 "internal/robot/attention_feed.go",
+		RequestorAgent:       "worker-a",
+		HolderReservationIDs: []int{42},
+	}, watcher.ConflictActionForce)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("handleConflictAction(force) error: %v", err)
+	}
+
+	mu.Lock()
+	gotCalls := append([]string(nil), calls...)
+	mu.Unlock()
+
+	wantCalls := []string{"register_agent", "force_release_file_reservation"}
+	if !slices.Equal(gotCalls, wantCalls) {
+		t.Fatalf("tool call order = %v, want %v", gotCalls, wantCalls)
+	}
+}
+
 // Test that commands return tea.Cmd (not nil)
 func TestCommandsReturnTeaCmd(t *testing.T) {
 	t.Parallel()
